description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a right-hand chaise, upholstered in a smooth, dark gray fabric. The sofa features three individual back cushions, each with a single centered button tuft, and a single long seat cushion for the main section, while the chaise section has its own extended seat and back cushion. The armrests are straight, broad, and padded, matching the height of the backrest for a boxy, contemporary silhouette. The sofa sits on short, block-style wooden legs with a light natural finish, slightly recessed under the frame for a floating appearance. The upholstery appears uniform and matte, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching aside from the button tufting. This piece is designed for comfort and style, suitable for urban living rooms, lounges, or waiting areas.
description: A modern, dark gray L-shaped sectional sofa with button-tufted back cushions, broad padded armrests, and short wooden legs. The upholstery is smooth and matte, giving it a contemporary, urban look.
description_view_0: Front angle view showing the full L-shape, three back cushions with button tufting, and the right-side chaise extension.
description_view_1: Side view of the chaise section, highlighting the depth of the seat and the straight, padded armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the alignment of the three back cushions, as well as the wooden legs.
description_view_3: Side view of the main sofa section, showing the armrest and the transition to the chaise, with all cushions visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual back cushions with button tufting and two seat cushions (one for the main section, one for the chaise), all appearing attached and uniform in size.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, broad, and padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with a boxy, contemporary profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs made of light wood, positioned at the corners and slightly recessed under the frame, with a simple, exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with three segmented, attached cushions featuring single button tufting; continuous along the main section and chaise.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and minimal visible texture, except for subtle button tufting on the back cushions.
